title: Games News by Elusion Works
summary: Public-safe game development, gaming, review, and preview news surfaces powered by a separate scheduled pipeline.
notice: The page is wired for generated feed outputs. The first scheduled games runs still need to publish their initial items into this manifest.

platformPolicy.summary: Games coverage on this hub is filtered to Windows, Xbox, and PlayStation only. Xbox and PlayStation stories must carry the specific hardware or service model where known.
modelRules: Use `Windows PC` for PC-first coverage. Add store tags like `Steam`, `GOG`, or `Epic Games Store` only as extra tags, not as separate platform families.
Use explicit Xbox model tags such as `Xbox One`, `Xbox Series X`, `Xbox Series S`, `Xbox Game Pass`, or `Xbox Cloud Gaming` when the story is platform-specific.
Use explicit PlayStation model tags such as `PlayStation 4`, `PlayStation 5`, `PS VR2`, or `PlayStation Plus` when the story is platform-specific.

feeds.title: Game Dev News
feeds.summary: Engine releases, tooling, middleware, store policy, production craft, and the business of making games.
taggingRules: Tag only if the development story is materially tied to a shipping platform or platform holder.
Prefer `Windows PC` for engine, middleware, and tooling stories unless a console platform holder is central to the announcement.

feeds.title: Gaming News
feeds.summary: Platform moves, major announcements, releases, notable studio stories, and wider games industry coverage.
taggingRules: Every item should carry platform tags when the platform is known.
Xbox and PlayStation items should use the specific model or service where the story makes that distinction.

feeds.title: Games Reviews
feeds.summary: Final verdicts, scored criticism, and notable critical consensus from major games outlets.
taggingRules: Review items should always distinguish final scored reviews from updated reviews in progress.
Platform tags should reflect the reviewed build or platform availability called out by the outlet.

feeds.title: Games Previews
feeds.summary: Hands-on impressions, early verdicts, showcase reactions, and first-look coverage before final review.
taggingRules: Preview items should stay unscored and should not be mixed into final review coverage.
Tag the most specific platform shown or discussed in the preview coverage.
